## smilelog patient create

Create a patient

```
smilelog patient create [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -e, --email string      email of the patient
  -h, --help              help for create
  -l, --lastname string   last name of the patient
  -n, --name string       name of the patient
  -p, --phone uint        phone number of the patitent
```
